news.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.

news.title: Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show
news.summary: Trump bought shares of Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola and Dell worth millions, new ethics disclosure filings show. Trump also owns shares of Google, Apple, Facebook, Twitter, Microsoft and others.

news.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
news.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president. He has overseen an expansion to record highs as well as major declines. The stock market is now at its highest level in more than a decade.

news.title: The bond market is flashing a warning over Iran. A veteran of energy geopolitics explains the risk
news.summary: Daleep Singh knows how energy and markets intersect. He sees trouble ahead for the energy sector. Singh: "I don't think it's going to be a good year for energy."

news.title: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube
news.summary: creator content is a new category for reaching younger audiences. In media companies' annual pitch to advertisers this week, creator content played a bigger role.

news.title: Most people make this retirement mistake. You might still have time to fix it.
news.summary: CNN.com will feature iReporter photos in a weekly Travel Snapshots gallery. Visit CNN.com/Travel each week for a new gallery of snapshots.

news.title: My wife and I retired with 22 times our income. Why don’t more people do what we did?
news.summary: “The vast majority of people I’ve known are intimidated by money’s power, imbue it with almost magical qualities,” he says.

news.title: ‘I’m already feeling anxious’: My ex-husband offered to give me a $30,000 lump sum for child support. Is there a catch?
news.summary: “He has not paid the last two months, and it is not court-ordered,” she said. “He’s not paid for two months.” “I’m not going to let him get away with it,’’ she added. ‘He has to pay.’

news.title: $668,603,360,342 — that’s how much people have legally bet on sports since the Supreme Court’s 2018 ruling
news.summary: States have collected over $12 billion in tax revenue from sports betting since it was legalized in some states. Some states have collected more than $1 billion in the past year.

news.title: Are you ‘doomjobbing’ while looking for work? Know the signs — and do this instead.
news.summary: One job hunter only found work once she stopped making this popular application mistake. “It was soul-crushing,” says one job hunter.
